notes: Iter 12: PROPER R3 CASH DOMINANCE + ultra R1. Iter 11's R3_base_w_cash_raw>=0.5 didn't enforce normalized dominance because QQQ/XLU raws were unbounded. Now: cash raw [0.7,1.0] AND QQQ/XLU each capped at 0.3 → R3 normalized CASH guaranteed >=54%, up to 100%. R1 push: raw TQQQ [0.85,1.0], QQQ/XLU each [0,0.15] → normalized TQQQ guaranteed >=74%. Slightly wider R1 band (dd_t1 [5%, 8%]) for more compounding time. Hypothesis: ultra-leveraged R1 + truly cash-dominant R3 should push CAGR closer to 30% while keeping worst_DD <-35%.
